title: Pages & User Interface
description: Master Business Central page development. Create Card, List, Document, and Role Center pages with actions, factboxes, and modern UI patterns.
shortDescription: Build professional BC user interfaces with pages and page extensions.
learningOutcomes: Create Card, List, and Document pages
Add actions, promoted actions, and factboxes
Build page extensions for standard BC pages
Apply modern UI patterns and best practices
prerequisites: Understanding of tables and table extensions

modules.title: Page Types
modules.description: Learn the different page types and when to use each.

modules.title: Actions & Navigation
modules.description: Add actions, promoted actions, and navigation to your pages.
